name: SCC_SessionStopReq
title: SCC_SessionStopReq
syntax: void SCC_SessionStopReq ( byte SessionID[], long Terminate )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Session Stop Request is received.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF
